summary: Completed testing of Volume Bot 3 (Bot Makk GL) pair mode features. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend shows correct labels: 'Bot Makk GL' tab, 'Token Bazowy (MAKK GL)', 'Token Docelowy (CRBR)'. Wallet display shows 'Base' balance label. All other bots remain accessible (no regression).

test_classes: TestVolume3Status (3 tests): pair_mode field, running field, config with output_mint
TestVolume3ConfigUpdate (3 tests): accepts output_mint, accepts token_mint, clear output_mint disables pair_mode
TestVolume3Wallets (2 tests): wallets endpoint, balance_sol/balance_ftrx/balance_quote fields
TestVolume1NoRegression (3 tests): status works, pair_mode is false, wallets work
TestOtherBotsAccessible (7 tests): volume2, spread, sniper, trade, arbitrage, copytrade, holder all accessible
TestBotListEndpoint (1 test): volume3 in bot list
api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/admin/bot/volume3/status - returns pair_mode, config with output_mint
GET /api/admin/bot/status - Volume Bot 1 still works (no regression)
GET /api/admin/wallets - Volume Bot 1 wallets still work

wallet_balance_labels.quote_label: Would appear if wallets have quote tokens

pair_mode_verification.feature: Volume Bot 3 token pair mode (MAKK GL <-> CRBR)

backend_implementation._is_pair_mode(): Returns True when output_mint is configured
backend_implementation._pick_pair_action(): Picks BUY/SELL based on base/quote token balances
backend_implementation._refresh_pair_token_balances(): Refreshes both base and quote token balances

critical_code_review_comments: VolumeBot class in volume_bot.py correctly implements pair mode with _is_pair_mode(), _pick_pair_action(), _do_pair_buy(), _do_pair_sell()
BotConfigUpdate model in server.py includes output_mint field (line 96)
Frontend Admin.jsx correctly shows 'Bot Makk GL' tab with orange color (#FF6B35)
ConfigPanel in Admin.jsx conditionally shows 'Token Bazowy (MAKK GL)' and 'Token Docelowy (CRBR)' labels when output_mint is defined
Wallet display shows 'Base' and 'Quote' labels for token balances in pair mode
BOT_CONFIG_FIELDS['volume3'] defines correct fields including output_mint
seed_data_creation: Volume3 bot has 25 wallets with 0.0923 SOL total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Volume Bot 3 (Bot Makk GL) pair mode fully tested.
